improvement: Build a privacy-preserving Cloudflare Pages hostname authority record directly from the existing sanitized target-project access probe, with optional deployment URL binding.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical authored files before GitHub commit
cases: canonical hostname authority from a ready privacy-safe probe
deterministic digest under equivalent normalized inputs

privacy_boundary: The artifact consumes only the existing access probe's public project name and hostnames and requires explicit assertions that secret values and account ID were not emitted.
epistemic_limit: This proves deterministic source behavior only. It does not prove credentials exist, the Pages project currently resolves, DNS works, HTTP responds, the intended surface is served, the deployment commit matches, or any scientific claim is true.
falsification_route: Provide a ready privacy-safe access probe whose canonical hostname or deployment relationship is misclassified, or run the committed test suite and observe a failure.
